summary: CRITICAL: Workflow has unpinned action (line 6: `actions/checkout@v4`—must be pinned to full SHA). Bash script (lines 28–33) doesn't propagate exit codes: `output=$(python3 ...)` silently swallows failures, hiding errors. Script should use `set -euo pipefail` or explicit error check. Using `--break-system-packages` is a red flag. Python script itself is high-quality: no deps, proper types, good validation. But workflow will mask real failures as success—unsuitable for production.
